tool.name: GSAS2 Refinement Prototype
tool.command: mkdir -p "$_GALAXY_JOB_TMP_DIR/portal" && touch $output && #set gsas_filename=os.path.basename(str($gsas_file.element_identifier)) ln -s $gsas_file ./$gsas_filename && ln -s $prm_file ./input.instprm && #for $index, $cif_file in enumerate($cif_files) ln -s $cif_file ./input_${index}.cif && #end for (cd /GSAS-II/pixi && pixi run python -m gsas2_refinement.gsas2_refinement #for $index, $cif_file in enumerate($cif_files) --cif-filenames ../working/input_${index}.cif #end for --gsas-filename ../working/$gsas_filename --instrument-params-filename ../working/input.instprm #for $bank in $bank_ids --bank-ids $bank.bank_id #end for --xmin $xmin --xmax $xmax --output-directory "$_GALAXY_JOB_TMP_DIR/portal") > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
